kubeadmConfigPatches:
apiVersion: kubeadm.k8s.io/v1beta4
kind: "InitConfiguration"
nodeRegistration:
  kubeletExtraArgs:
    system-reserved: "cpu=5,memory=9912.32Mi"
    eviction-hard: "memory.available<100Mi,nodefs.available<5%,nodefs.inodesFree<3%"

apiVersion: kubeadm.k8s.io/v1beta4
kind: "JoinConfiguration"
nodeRegistration:
  kubeletExtraArgs:
    system-reserved: "cpu=4,memory=8888.32Mi"
    eviction-hard: "memory.available<100Mi,nodefs.available<5%,nodefs.inodesFree<3%"

apiVersion: kubeadm.k8s.io/v1beta4
kind: "JoinConfiguration"
nodeRegistration:
  kubeletExtraArgs:
    system-reserved: "cpu=3,memory=6840.32Mi"
    eviction-hard: "memory.available<100Mi,nodefs.available<5%,nodefs.inodesFree<3%"
